name: fileSizeUnit
description: Converts byte values to human-readable file size strings with appropriate units (KB, MB, GB, etc.).
usage_guidelines: Use for displaying file sizes in UI.
Supports both SI (1000-based) and binary (1024-based) units.
Handles negative values and edge cases.

params.name: si
params.description: Use SI units (1000-based) if true, binary (1024-based) if false.

return_value.description: Formatted file size string with unit (e.g., '1.5 MB', '2.3 GB').

Do: Be consistent with SI vs binary
Use in file lists and details
Dont: Don't mix SI and binary units
Don't forget to handle zero bytes
